name: ASRock B760M PG LIGHTNING Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 3x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 with DSC - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B760M PG LIGHTNING Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX B760 gaming motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0 and premium features.
